email_template.subject: Your a11y-annotator Pro download
email_template.body:
Thanks for purchasing a11y-annotator Pro!

Your download is attached to this email.

To install:
1. Unzip the file
2. Open Chrome and go to chrome://extensions
3. Enable Developer mode (top right)
4. Click Load unpacked and select the unzipped folder
5. The extension is ready to use

For help, reply to this email.

- support@ericjoye.com
